name: MeterMaid
tagline: A real-time LUFS loudness meter for your desktop.
description: MeterMaid is a free, open-source desktop loudness meter. Measure LUFS to the EBU R128 / ITU-R BS.1770 standard, watch a live frequency spectrum, and level guitar amp and effect patches by ear-honest, matched loudness. macOS, Windows, and Linux.
author: David Neal
